title: penstemon menziesii var. newberryi
intro: Penstemon menziesii var. newberryi is a variety of the Menzies' beardtongue plant, a type of flowering perennial native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Penstemon menziesii var. newberryi include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
